name: Bismuth Armor
description:
This silvery, pink-tinged +2 resilient full plate is polished to the point that its surface is completely reflective. This armor can reflect some of the light generated by magical attacks.

Activate—Reflect Shine (Reaction) (arcane, light, manipulate)

Frequency once per hour

Trigger A creature targets you with a magical effect that has the attack trait

Effect You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to AC against the triggering attack. If the attack misses, the spell reflects toward the caster, who becomes Dazzled for 1 round.
